description: Perform a clinical simulation test by inducing a tachycardia event in OpenICE using a 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter and the 'Vital Signs' clinical application. Induce a heart rate sufficient to trigger a tachycardia alarm. Save a screenshot of the alarm state to /home/ga/Desktop/tachycardia_alarm_evidence.png and create a text report at /home/ga/Desktop/simulation_verification_log.txt documenting the peak heart rate value and a description of the observed visual alarm indicator.
